supported_groundings.name: native-ethos-json
supported_groundings.parser_scope: native Ethos document JSON through the existing GroundingSource path
supported_groundings.expected_capability_boundary: page, text, text_bbox, and table_cell anchors can bind when the source provides the required evidence

supported_groundings.name: opendataloader-json
supported_groundings.parser_scope: OpenDataLoader-style JSON through the existing opendataloader-json adapter
supported_groundings.expected_capability_boundary: text anchors can bind; bbox detail remains capability_limited when coordinate capability is unavailable

explicit_blockers: crop rendering or source-region image generation
benchmark, speed, footprint, parser-quality, or table-quality claims
